description: Schema defining data points to extract from sustainability reports for PCAF compliance assessment

institution_name.description: Legal name of the financial institution

entity_type.expected_format: One of: insurer, bank, asset_manager, reinsurer, bancassurance, exchange, investment_holding

reporting_year.description: Fiscal year of the sustainability report

pcaf_mentioned.description: Whether the PCAF standard is explicitly mentioned in the report

pcaf_signatory.description: Whether the institution identifies as a PCAF signatory or committed member

scope3_total.description: Total Scope 3 emissions including financed emissions
scope3_total.expected_format: Numeric value in tCO2e or MtCO2e

unit.expected_format: One of: tCO2e, MtCO2e, ktCO2e, unknown

methodology.description: Description of the attribution methodology used

base_year.description: Base year for financed emissions calculation

part_a.description: Status of Part A (Financed Emissions) reporting

part_b.description: Status of Part B (Facilitated Emissions) reporting
part_b.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

part_c.description: Status of Part C (Insurance-Associated Emissions) reporting
part_c.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

dqs_weighted_average.description: Weighted average Data Quality Score across the portfolio

dqs_by_asset_class.description: Data Quality Score broken down by asset class
dqs_by_asset_class.expected_format: Object mapping asset_class_id to DQS value (1-5)

listed_equity_corporate_bonds.description: Coverage status for listed equity and corporate bonds
listed_equity_corporate_bonds.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

business_loans_unlisted_equity.description: Coverage status for business loans and unlisted equity
business_loans_unlisted_equity.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

project_finance.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

commercial_real_estate.description: Coverage status for commercial real estate
commercial_real_estate.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

residential_mortgages.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

motor_vehicle_loans.description: Coverage status for motor vehicle loans
motor_vehicle_loans.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

use_of_proceeds.description: Coverage status for use of proceeds instruments
use_of_proceeds.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

securitized_structured.description: Coverage status for securitized and structured products
securitized_structured.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

sovereign_debt.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

sub_sovereign_debt.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

capital_markets.description: Coverage status for capital markets issuance facilitation
capital_markets.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

advisory_services.description: Coverage status for advisory services facilitation
advisory_services.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

insurance_underwriting.description: Overall coverage status for insurance underwriting emissions
insurance_underwriting.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

commercial_lines.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

personal_motor.description: Coverage for personal motor insurance lines
personal_motor.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

project_insurance.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

treaty_reinsurance.expected_format: One of: reported, partial, missing, N/A

validation_rules_definitions.non_empty: Value must not be null or empty string
validation_rules_definitions.boolean: Value must be true or false
validation_rules_definitions.non_negative_or_range: Numeric value >= 0, or a string range like '87-161'
validation_rules_definitions.range: Value must fall within specified min:max range
validation_rules_definitions.range_values: All values in the object must fall within specified range
validation_rules_definitions.valid_entity_type: Must match a defined entity type in common/entity_types.json
validation_rules_definitions.valid_status: Must be one of: reported, partial, missing
validation_rules_definitions.valid_status_with_na: Must be one of: reported, partial, missing, N/A
validation_rules_definitions.valid_unit: Must be one of: tCO2e, MtCO2e, ktCO2e, unknown
validation_rules_definitions.valid_asset_class_keys: Keys must match PCAF asset class IDs from standard.json
validation_rules_definitions.unit_check: Value should be reported in the specified unit
